command: uv run python scripts/train_dense_decoder.py --corpus-jsonl data/hf_mirror/exploratory_d3/corpus.jsonl --corpus-record results/D4_hf_corpus_materialization.json --device rocm --seq-len 128 --hidden-dim 528 --layers 3 --heads 8 --batch-size 2 --steps 10000 --validation-batches 512 --gradient-accumulation-steps 1 --mixed-precision fp32 --learning-rate 0.0001 --optimizer-name adamw --attention-mask-mode finite_causal --progress-interval 500 --checkpoint-interval 1000 --architecture-variant dense --adapter-dim 0 --validation-seed 424242 --block-impl explicit_causal --max-documents 0 --max-file-bytes 256000 --output-dir artifacts/T10c_dense528_adamw_fp32_width_control_probe --output results/T10c_dense528_adamw_fp32_width_control_probe.json --experiment-id T10c_dense528_adamw_fp32_width_control_probe --seed 123
